environment_discovery.launch_identity_correction: The initial same-name launch resolved to the installed Program Files executable and was discarded; an identical uniquely named artifact was then confirmed as the exact dist process.
environment_discovery.windows_state_capture: Exact-build screenshot capture failed with SetIsBorderRequired/interface not supported (0x80004002); exact-build text-only UI Automation succeeded in an earlier run.
environment_discovery.text_only_ui_automation: Exact build exposed a 176-element tree with names, roles, states, and table values.
environment_discovery.keyboard_probe: The focused-element report remained on global search while keyboard behaviour changed the active route to Analytics; input calls also timed out intermittently, so no focus or keyboard verdict was accepted.

owner_keyboard_observation.environment: single 1920x1080 display; logical DPI 96; exact frozen build
confirmed: Visible focus was observed and moved between controls.
The requested Tab sweep did not become trapped.
No clipped or overlapping text was observed in the displayed state.
owner_keyboard_observation.theme_result: Keyboard traversal continued to work after switching from light to dark, but dark theme exposed white fallback strips on native table, scrollbar, tab, progress, and controller-owned search surfaces.
owner_keyboard_observation.status_policy: Partial owner observation only; no cell promoted.

owner_narrator_observation.environment: single 1920x1080 display; logical DPI 96; exact uniquely named frozen build; Windows Narrator
owner_narrator_observation.steps: 10 Tab transitions followed by 5 Shift+Tab transitions at a slow interval
confirmed: Narrator speech moved between distinct controls.
Russian control names were readable without mojibake.
Shift+Tab speech moved backward without a loop.
unresolved: complete role, state, value, relation, and dynamic-announcement speech
owner_narrator_observation.status_policy: Partial owner observation only; no SR or native cell promoted.

owner_dpi_125_observation.environment: single 1920x1080 display; Windows Settings UIA confirmed 125%; exact uniquely named frozen build restarted after scale change
automation_evidence: The complete exposed UIA tree contained zero mojibake marker lines.
owner_confirmed: No clipped or overlapping text or controls were observed.
Light and dark themes switched without white fallback strips.
Tab and Shift+Tab moved focus without a trap.
owner_dpi_125_observation.restoration: PASS; Windows Settings UIA confirmed 100% (recommended) after the run, and the exact test process and Settings window were closed.
owner_dpi_125_observation.status_policy: Partial owner observation only; NATIVE-1920-125-DL is BLOCKED rather than PASS.

The exact build remained responsive after 10 Tab transitions and 5 Shift+Tab transitions.
owner_confirmed: No clipping, overlap, or white fallback strips were observed.
The focus indicator was visible and moved forward and backward without a trap.
Russian text and control states remained distinguishable.

menus, tooltips, dialogs, tables, charts, and destructive-warning surfaces
complete Narrator name, role, state, value, relation, and announcement output
owner_high_contrast_observation.restoration: PASS; the owner disabled High Contrast, the registry reported HighContrast Flags 126, and the exact test process and Settings window were closed.

closeout_frozen_build.privacy: The raw self-test report remains untracked because it contains transient local paths.

dark_theme_fix_rerun.native_visual_result: After switching from light to dark on the exact fixed build, the owner confirmed that the previously observed white fallback strips were removed.

russian_feedback_fix_rerun.defect_observation: Exact-build text-only UIA exposed 143 elements and reproduced mojibake in the Russian safe-feedback banner.
russian_feedback_fix_rerun.native_observer: Codex-assisted exact-build UIA session after explicit owner launch approval
russian_feedback_fix_rerun.native_environment: single 1920x1080 display; logical DPI 96; exact uniquely named frozen build
russian_feedback_fix_rerun.native_result: Exact process and Corteris Tender AI 1.3 Alpha title confirmed; text-only UIA exposed 176 elements, correct Russian safe-feedback text in status, AI-warning, and data-state projections, and zero mojibake marker lines.

environment_discovery.observation_boundary: Exact artifact identity, a text-only UIA tree, owner-observed visible moving focus, and a short owner-observed Narrator forward/reverse sweep were recorded, but complete keyboard, screenshot, Narrator, DPI, and reliable focus-order evidence were not; no native cell promoted.

owner_exception_decision.statement: The project owner explicitly approved named exceptions for the remaining RM-152 cells.
owner_exception_decision.policy: Retain BLOCKED and NOT_EXECUTED statuses; never convert an exception to PASS.

environment.narrator_short_sweep: PASS for distinct-control speech, readable Russian names, and reverse movement without a loop; partial assertions only

evidence: Visible focus was observed moving between controls.
Tab did not become trapped in the requested sweep.
Shift+Tab moved focus backward.
No clipped or overlapping text was observed in the displayed state.
Dark theme showed white fallback strips on native table, scrollbar, tab, progress, and controller-owned search surfaces in the original artifact.
The owner confirmed those white fallback strips were removed after a light-to-dark switch on fixed artifact 81A11CF64665E61A29739F349BA435F21B234252476B46917DC8D8A0D342A866.

On artifact 11E59DC42FDBAC4F804D7006F01BA7E6AB7BA4E0C78B60DA455BBAB4993066F0, Windows Narrator spoke distinct controls and readable Russian names during 10 Tab and 5 Shift+Tab transitions; reverse speech moved backward without a loop.
cells.note: The original visual defect and the later Russian safe-feedback mojibake both passed their exact fixed-artifact reruns. A short Narrator forward/reverse sweep also passed its observed assertions. Cell remains BLOCKED rather than PASS because all semantic states, complete route order, and complete Narrator output remain incomplete.

The owner confirmed Tab and Shift+Tab movement without a focus trap.
